candidate_a.title: Sleep Sentinel
candidate_a.target_user: Light sleepers suffering from screen light overstimulation
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Late night fidgeting and phone reliance impacting transition to REM cycles
candidate_a.core_concept: Audio-only tactical adventure navigable through binary haptic pulses and voice commands while keeping the eyes fully closed (phone screen brightness reduced to black).
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Binaural storytelling using spatial audio to indicate direction; user must verbally command left, right, or push maneuvers to solve escape puzzles while lying in darkness.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Calibration of gyroscope-to-rotation mapping for selecting directions within a simple 3x3 audio maze.

candidate_b.title: Sleep Sentinel
candidate_b.target_user: Light sleepers suffering from screen light overstimulation
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Late night fidgeting and phone reliance impacting transition to REM cycles
candidate_b.core_concept: Audio-only tactical adventure navigable through haptic and voice commands.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: An audio-only adventure game where players navigate a simple maze using voice commands.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Calibration of gyroscope-to-rotation mapping for selecting directions within a simple 3x3 audio maze. | Record audio cues for maze navigation; Implement voice command recognition; Build simple 3x3 maze logic

candidate_a.title: Creative Brief Translator
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: The information gap between high-level client conceptual needs and individual production brief quality.
candidate_a.core_concept: Automated extraction of technical requirements from unstructured meeting transcripts into structured templates.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A tool that processes uploaded meeting transcripts to populate a standardized creative brief template.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A web interface where users upload a transcript and receive a pre-filled brief based on a fixed template. | Select target creative brief template; Develop prompt engineering for transcript extraction; Build simple file upload UI; Implement template export (e.g., PDF/Docx)

candidate_b.title: Creative Brief Translator
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: The information gap between high-level client conceptual needs and individual production brief quality.
candidate_b.core_concept: Agents that 'shadow' planning calls to autonomously document technical requirements for contractors.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Agent analyzes collaborative whiteboard output and transcript data to fill structured standardized agency brief templates.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Template ingestion for graphic design asset requests derived from transcribed meetings.

candidate_a.title: Mind Mapping Mycology
candidate_a.target_user: Project managers needing mental organizational structure
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Hard-to-track complex logical connections between project silos
candidate_a.core_concept: An isometric management simulation where project nodes propagate resources like fungal mycelium, forcing identification of 'thin' link areas through intuitive visual obstruction.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Mapping abstract work dependencies to subterranean connections; broken/weak linkages result in wilting the surface network of crops.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Visualization engine displaying connections between one parent and three child entities.

candidate_b.title: Mind Mapping Mycology
candidate_b.target_user: Project managers needing mental organizational structure
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Hard-to-track complex logical connections between project silos
candidate_b.core_concept: Isometric management simulation where project nodes propagate resources.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: An isometric management game where project nodes are connected, and players must manage resource flow between them.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A visualization engine displaying connections between one parent and three child entities. | Design isometric node system; Implement resource flow logic; Build simple UI for node management

candidate_a.title: Regulatory Change Response Architect
candidate_a.target_user: Food and beverage quality assurance heads
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Drastic differences in health safety manual implementation when regulations shift locally.
candidate_a.core_concept: Mapping new legislation changes to existing internal standard operating procedure documents using diff identification.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Monitoring governmental regulatory feeds for trigger keywords and automatically highlighting modified procedure steps for policy-drafter human rewrite.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Dashboard tool for monitoring two specific municipality codes impacting packaging labeling.

candidate_b.title: Regulatory Change Response Architect
candidate_b.target_user: Food and beverage quality assurance heads
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Drastic differences in health safety manual implementation when regulations shift locally.
candidate_b.core_concept: Mapping regulatory changes to internal SOPs using diff identification.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to upload new regulations and existing SOPs, then highlights potential areas of conflict.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A web tool where users paste text from a regulation and an SOP, and the tool highlights keywords that appear in both. | Define keyword mapping; Build text comparison engine; Create simple UI; Test with sample regulations

candidate_a.title: Vendor Selection Orchestrator
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Difficulty in finding legitimate, non-spammy shipping and fulfillment partners
candidate_a.core_concept: A verified private dashboard of filtered vendors based on store volume metrics
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Manual white-glove curation of pre-negotiated volume tiers
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Google Sheets landing page portal connecting 5 retailers to vetted 3PL vendors

candidate_b.title: Vendor Selection Orchestrator
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Difficulty in finding legitimate, non-spammy shipping and fulfillment partners
candidate_b.core_concept: A curated, private directory of vetted e-commerce fulfillment partners.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A curated directory of vetted 3PL vendors for small e-commerce brands, focusing on reliability and transparency.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A Google Sheets portal connecting 5 retailers to 3 vetted vendors. | Vet 3 reliable 3PL vendors.; Create a landing page/portal.; Onboard 5 retailers.; Facilitate introductions.
